text: Malicious transaction detected

classification.rationale: Three-word alert label. Too short to read a full inner attitude or tempo. The phrase is Direct (spatial orientation — naming a structural fact) and Quick (alert), which nudges toward Awake, but there is no prose to sustain a tempo reading. 'Detected' carries a brief Awake/Acute flash of scanning-and-naming, but the sample is genuinely too minimal to pin a single dominant tempo.

text: Powered by

classification.rationale: Two words — a fragment attribution label ('Powered by'). No motion, no attitude, no stress readable. Genuinely too short.

text: Malicious Transaction

classification.rationale: Two-word noun label. Identical limitation to IE002 — a UI heading, not a prose sample. No motion factor readable.

text: This transaction was flagged as malicious by Blockaid. {description}.

classification.rationale: A settled, unhedged declarative: names the structural fact (flagged as malicious, attributed source, placeholder for description). No force or exertion against resistance — the Weight test fails. The line orients and places the reader spatially/cognitively: classic Awake 'Certain' territory (Space+Time, Weightless). Aspect is Penetrating (Space-led — cuts to structural identification). Pole is Direct. Motor is light: gliding (sustained orientation) into dabbing (quick point of attribution). The {description} placeholder reads as an open slot, not as hedging.
classification.literary_anchor: Awake sensor naming the field

text: Learn more about Blockaid

classification.rationale: Three-word CTA label. Too minimal to read a tempo. A slight Awake lean (inviting orientation/learning) but not enough prose to classify.

text: This transaction has been flagged as malicious.

classification.rationale: Single unhedged declarative: structural identification without force. Weight test: no exertion, no pressure against resistance — just a clean spatial placement of a fact. Awake 'Certain' (Space+Time, Weightless). Penetrating aspect (Space-led, cuts to structural naming). Direct pole. Light motor: gliding into dabbing. Essentially identical register to IE004 but without the attribution clause.

text: This transaction has been flagged as malicious.

classification.rationale: Identical text to IE006. Same reading applies: unhedged declarative, no Weight evidence, Awake 'Certain', Penetrating/Direct, light motor.

text: Connection request blocked

classification.rationale: Three-word alert label (title case). Same limitation as IE001/IE003 — a UI state label, not a prose sample. 'Blocked' carries a slight Unsociable/Remote flash (withholding, refusal), but the sample is too short to sustain a tempo classification.

text: connection request blocked

classification.rationale: Identical to IE008 but lowercase — a system/log-level label variant. Same limitation applies. Too short to classify.

text: This website has been flagged as malicious by Blockaid. Always do your own research before proceeding.

classification.rationale: Two-clause structure: (1) 'This website has been flagged as malicious by Blockaid' — unhedged structural identification, same Awake-Certain register as IE004/IE006. (2) 'Always do your own research before proceeding' — a prescriptive advisory that flashes a Remote-family Unsociable beat (withholding, aristocratic-aloof refusal to hand-hold) and an Awake-Acute beat (vigilance, scanning). Weight test on the whole: no force/exertion against resistance — the confidence is Direct (Space), not Strong (Weight). Primary tempo remains Certain (Awake, Space+Time, Weightless, Penetrating/Direct). The prescriptive second clause adds outer-action flashes of Unsociable and Acute.
classification.literary_anchor: Awake sensor + Remote withdrawal: 'I name it; what you do is yours'

text: Potential risks found:

classification.rationale: A scanning, orienting alert — 'Potential risks found:' is a colon-open structural notice, Space-led (orienting the reader to what follows), Light-Weight (no force/exertion, just a clean pointer). Awake family: Acute reads as the sharp sensor that flags and directs attention. No mass or pressure — fails Weight test. Direct pole on space stress. Dabbing motor (Light/Direct/Quick — short, precise, pointing).

classification.rationale: A flat, unhedged categorical declaration — 'Malicious dapp detected.' Direct/settled, no equivocation. Awake 'Certain': maximal declarative certainty, Weightless by definition. Space-led (penetrating aspect) — cuts straight to structural fact. The curt, carved-off delivery flashes an Unsociable (Remote) outer beat — it admits no reply and severs contact. Weight test: confidence is not force; no exertion evidence.

text: Detected as malicious site

classification.rationale: 'Detected as malicious site.' Four words; passive-voice detection statement. Factual and direct but no prose motion, no relational texture, no Weight or Flow evidence. Too sparse for any tempo.

text: Your account has been disabled. You have limited access to your account and it has been placed in send-only mode.

classification.rationale: A declarative administrative sentence — states a structural fact and orients the user to their new constrained status. Weight test: no force/exertion against resistance; the finality is Direct (Space), not Strong. Self-Contained (Stable Light+Direct) fits: settled, measured, withholding warmth. The curtailment ('disabled', 'send-only mode') flashes a Remote-family Unsociable beat — carved-off, exclusionary. Aspect is penetrating (Space-led, cuts to the structural situation). Motor is light: gliding (informational delivery) → dabbing (short, final, direct).
classification.literary_anchor: A functionary delivering a ruling — no force, just structural fact.

text: It looks like you're using an old version of the app, refresh to update.

classification.rationale: A light, quick, helpful nudge — 'it looks like' softens, 'refresh' is an immediate call to action. Time-stressed and Quick-poled: there's a small urgency to act now. Weight test: no muscular force, no pressure against resistance — this is Light. Mobile family (Time+Flow) fits the fragmented, reactive, momentary register. Acknowledged (Mobile) reads as the noticed-and-passed-on quality: the system has clocked the situation and bounces it to the user. Circumscribing aspect (Time-led). Motor: dabbing (light, direct, quick notice) → flicking (light, flexible, quick dispatch).
classification.literary_anchor: A helpful stage-manager catching a small problem mid-show.

text: "{{message}}" (operator-driven via feature flag — no shipped default)

classification.rationale: This is a template/operator placeholder with no shipped prose content — it is a code stub, not a sample of brand voice. There is nothing to read.

text: We'll be back soon

classification.rationale: Four words, very short — but the register is reassuring, body-forward, relational: 'We'll be back soon' presupposes a shared space, a mutual relationship. Near (Weight+Time) family; stress falls on flow (continuity of relationship, no rupture). Warm (Near, flow-leaning, open) is the best fit — a gentle human promise. Weight test marginal: 'we'll be back' carries a mild relational weight of presence/absence but no muscular force — Light reads more cleanly; however the relational warmth tilts Near. Motor: floating (light, flexible, sustained continuity) → gliding (light, direct, sustained).
classification.literary_anchor: A shopkeeper's handwritten note on the door.

text: We're making some updates and will be back online soon. Your funds remain safe.

classification.rationale: Two moves: (1) relational reassurance about being back — Near/Warm, body-forward continuity; (2) 'Your funds remain safe' — a direct, unhedged, categorical assurance that flashes Awake 'Certain'. Primary register is Near+flow: inclusive 'we', ongoing process framing ('making updates'), human continuity. Warm (Near family) fits. Weight test: no muscular force — Light motor. The 'funds remain safe' beat lands as a penetrating Certain outer-action moment. Stress: flow (continuity, reassurance), pole: free.
classification.literary_anchor: The Nurse reassuring her charge that all will be well.

text: One of our upstream providers is offline for maintenance but they'll be back online soon. Your funds remain safe.

classification.rationale: Slightly more structural and distancing than IE035 — identifies an external third-party cause ('upstream providers'), names a mechanism, then reassures. The structural-diagnostic framing gives it a Space-led, slightly detached quality within the Near family: Cool (Near, more detached, analytical sub-tone). Weight test: no force, informational delivery — Light motor. 'Your funds remain safe' again flashes Awake Certain. Stress is space (orientation, naming the structural situation), pole direct. Aspect penetrating (Space-led cut to causal structure).
classification.literary_anchor: A calm operational briefing from a competent but slightly distant technician.

text: Temporarily unavailable

classification.rationale: Two words — the shortest possible functional label. No warmth, no explanation, no 'we', no relational framing. Remote (Space+Flow) family: Unsociable (the carved-off, withholding Remote tempo) is the cleanest read — the copy simply closes the door. Weight test: no force — Light. Motor: dabbing (Light, Direct, Quick — a short label placed and withdrawn). Aspect penetrating (Space-led; the line orients by negation). Stress space, pole direct.
classification.literary_anchor: A closed sign with no apology.

text: We're experiencing technical issues and have temporarily disabled the app while we investigate. Your funds remain safe.

classification.rationale: Three-beat structure: (1) 'experiencing technical issues' — acknowledges the situation with Near relational honesty; (2) 'temporarily disabled the app while we investigate' — active, responsible, slightly bound/held (not free-flowing); (3) 'Your funds remain safe' — Certain flash. The primary register is Near/Warm (inclusive 'we', body-forward accountability), but the stress is bound flow — a contained, effortful holding rather than free reassurance. The disabling action itself carries a hint of controlled force (pressing motor as inner preparation), though Weight test still leans Light overall — the primary motor is gliding. The 'disabled' beat flashes Unsociable (carved-off closure). Pole: bound (held, restrained continuity).
classification.literary_anchor: A responsible steward acknowledging a problem while holding the perimeter.

text: Make sure you deposit to the correct network or it could result in loss of funds

classification.rationale: A sharp, urgent warning — 'make sure', 'could result in loss of funds' is an alert to immediate consequence. Awake (Space+Time) family: Acute (the high-alert, sharp-attention Awake tempo) fits cleanly — sensor-mode, strategic warning, quick Time-stressed. Weight test: no muscular force — Light. Motor: dabbing (Light, Direct, Quick — a sharp precise touch) → flicking (Light, Flexible, Quick — the flick of a warning). Aspect circumscribing (Time-led — the urgency wraps around the action). Stress time, pole quick.

text: Please read our support article for more information.

classification.rationale: A direct, unhedged, orienting instruction: 'Please read our support article for more information.' text: Action required: Move your assets

classification.rationale: 'Action required: Move your assets' — a terse alert label. Awake 'Acute' reads: sharp, time-pressured noticing with direct orientation. The colon structure and imperative 'Move' land as a quick, direct puncture. Aspect is circumscribing (Time-led — an urgent call to act now). text: {chains} is/are being deprecated. Move your assets to a supported chain using Swidge before {deadline}. Your wallet keys remain yours — you can always access funds directly.

classification.rationale: This is the most complex sample in the set. It carries: a deprecation fact, a procedural instruction (use Swidge before {deadline}), and a reassurance ('your wallet keys remain yours — you can always access funds directly'). Stable 'Practical' (Weight+Space, decision-taken, procedural) reads as the dominant register: there is genuine structural weight here — a chain is being killed, assets must move, a deadline is set. The 'load' of deprecation and the responsibility to act gives Weight evidence beyond mere confidence. Aspect is penetrating (Space-led — mapping chain topology, network specificity). Stress is time (sustained — the deadline horizon gives a slow, sustained urgency rather than a sudden jab). An Awake 'Certain' flash surfaces at 'your wallet keys remain yours — you can always access funds directly' (unhedged, settled reassurance). A 'Warm' (Near) flash surfaces in the reassurance register of that same closing clause — a brief relational care beat. Motor: pressing (Practical's Stable+Sustained preparation) → gliding (the Light+Sustained reassurance close).
classification.literary_anchor: Aragorn giving orders before battle — practical, weight-bearing, closes with reassurance

text: Chain being deprecated

classification.rationale: Three words — a bare status label. Insufficient material to assign inner attitude, stress, aspect, or tempo. Reads as Direct+Quick (a dab-like placement) with a structural/spatial orientation, but no named tempo can be reliably pinned.

text: This asset is on {chains}, which is being deprecated. Move your assets to a supported chain using Swidge. Your wallet keys remain yours — you can always access funds directly.

The line 'Your wallet keys remain yours — you can always access funds directly' carries a subtle reassuring Self-Contained undertone, but the dominant register is Awake Certain (Space+Time, unhedged, clean placement). The deprecation warning flashes a brief Unsociable beat (Remote-family: carved-off, structural chill).

Classic Awake Certain — high clarity, zero Weight. The curt withholding flashes an Unsociable outer beat. Motor is Dabbing (Light/Direct/Quick) — brevity with precision, not muscular pressure.

text: Swidge is under maintenance

classification.rationale: Four-word status label. Genuinely too short to read inner attitude, aspect, or stress with any confidence. Cannot distinguish Certain, Self-Contained, or Unsociable as dominant from label alone.

text: Swidge is temporarily unavailable while we perform maintenance. Your funds remain safe. Please check back soon.

classification.rationale: Three beats: (1) state the situation, (2) reassure on safety, (3) invite return. The copy holds its ground calmly — 'Your funds remain safe' is load-bearing in the emotional sense of containment, not muscular force. The exclamation mark and 'briefly' keep it Mobile-family: Acknowledged (Mobile, Time+Flow) — the brand registers that the user is there and signals it's paying attention. No weight-bearing force. Aspect circumscribing (Time-led). Motor: Dabbing (Light/Direct/Quick) sustained into Flicking (Light/Flexible/Quick) as the tone tilts cheerful at the close.

text: One of your previous voucher redemptions has had an error and is currently under review. Please wait for us to resolve it before starting another redemption, or Contact Support

Near family (Weight+Time) but the emotional temperature is Cool (Near-Cool is the detached-but-caring end). The instruction 'Please wait for us to resolve it before starting another redemption' holds bound-flow — continuity of process, restrained. Weight test: no independent force/exertion. The 'Contact Support' pivot flashes a brief Unsociable outer beat (structural carved-off option). Motor: Gliding (sustained, smooth instruction delivery) → Dabbing (the direct 'or Contact Support' closing tap).

text: You're being rate limited by Hyperliquid and we cannot load your data. Please close unused perps windows, wait a few mins and refresh.

classification.rationale: 'You're being rate limited… we cannot load your data' — the brand acknowledges the user's blocked state and pivots immediately to remediation steps. Time-led (quick, sequenced: close / wait / refresh). Mobile-family Acknowledged: registers the user, names the problem, dispatches action. The 'Please close… wait a few mins and refresh' sequence is light-touch instructional. Weight test: no force. 'You're being rate limited by Hyperliquid' flashes a brief Unsociable outer beat (external authority, carved-off chill). Motor: Dabbing (Light/Direct/Quick) into Flicking (Light/Flexible/Quick) as the instruction list bounces along.

text: You're being rate limited by Hyperliquid and we cannot load your data. Close unused perps windows, wait a few minutes, then try again.

classification.rationale: IE070 is the same content as IE069 but with the 'Please' softener removed and 'try again' substituted for 'refresh'. The register hardens from Acknowledged (Mobile) to Certain (Awake): three clean directives with no hedging, no relational warmth, no exclamation — just structural orientation. Space-led (each clause is a direct pointer). Weight test fails: still no force. The stripped 'Close… wait… try again' reads as a tighter Awake Certain. Unsociable outer beat persists on 'rate limited by Hyperliquid'. Motor: Dabbing both ends (Light/Direct/Quick) — precise, frictionless, no linger.

text: High Liquidation Risk

classification.rationale: Three-word label — too short to read a full inner attitude. The word 'High' and 'Risk' carry urgency and orientation but the sample is a UI header, not prose. Cannot pin a tempo with confidence.

classification.rationale: The sentence is a direct, unhedged warning: 'this order WOULD PUT YOU at risk of IMMEDIATE liquidation'. The stress is Time (immediate, urgency of clock), Space-led penetrating aspect (it orients the user precisely to the structural risk). Weight test: no independent force/exertion — the line states a structural fact with precision, not muscular push. Awake family; Acute (the alarmed-sensor tempo) fits the scanning-for-danger register. Pole is Quick (the urgency of 'immediate'). The imperative commands 'Reduce size or leverage' flash a curt Unsociable beat (Remote-family curtness). Motor is light-touch direct — Dabbing (Light/Direct/Quick), no weight-bearing build.

Aspect is Penetrating (Space-led — cuts to structural insight). Pole Direct. Motor: Gliding (Light/Direct/Sustained) for the diagnosis, Dabbing (Light/Direct/Quick) for the imperative. The curt double-imperative ending flashes an Unsociable beat.

text: Trading Not Activated

text: Please activate trading to place orders. Click \"Activate Trading\" to continue.

classification.rationale: The copy guides the user through a gating ritual: 'Please activate… Click… to continue.' The 'Please' softens; the step-by-step guidance is relational and procedural. Mobile family: the sample fragments across two steps (state → action), acknowledging the user's position and routing them forward — Mobile 'Acknowledged' (the tempo that recognises a situation and hands the reader a next move). Aspect Circumscribing (Time-led — the sequential framing moves around the user's current stuck-state). Stress is Flow (the guidance yields, it doesn't cut). Pole Bound (the flow is held, conditional on completing the action). The final imperative 'Click… to continue' flashes a Certain beat (Awake family — single factual instruction). text: Trading Session Expired

text: Your trading session has expired. Please re-activate trading.

classification.rationale: Two clean declarative sentences: state the fact, give the remedy. No hedging, no urgency, no force against resistance — Weight test fails. Reads as Awake (Space+Time): alert, orienting, structural. Aspect is penetrating (Space-led — cuts to the point, orients the user). Pole direct. text: Something's not right

text: You acknowledge that you have read and understood the above disclaimer and accept the risks of interacting with permissionless markets deployed by this deployer.

Direct Space carries the sentence: it orients, enumerates, and forecloses ambiguity. Reads primarily Awake (Space+Time), Certain tempo — maximal declarative directness, weightless. Aspect penetrating (Space-led orientation). Motor gliding → dabbing (light, direct, sustained/quick). text: Please top up your gas account to continue.

Reads Awake (Space+Time): alert, orienting. The 'to continue' carries a faint Time-stress (something is paused, continuation is gated) but it is not urgent — sustained rather than quick. Aspect circumscribing (Time-led — the action is framed around continuity). Pole sustained. Motor light: gliding (orient) → dabbing (quick instruction). Tempo Certain — unhedged, clear, weightless.

text: Not enough {token} for gas.

text: Something went wrong

text: An unexpected error occurred. Please try reloading the page.

classification.rationale: 'An unexpected error occurred' signals the unresolved, non-oriented state of Awake Uncertain. Circumscribing aspect: the reload instruction wraps the moment in an action-frame. Light-Weight throughout — no force/exertion evidence. text: Please sign in again to continue

classification.rationale: 'Please sign in again to continue' — this is the first sample with a relational softness. 'Please' and 'to continue' both orient toward the user's experience and ongoing journey rather than just orienting the space. text: To ensure you can recovery your full portfolio from your Infinex wallet, enable recovery with a verified email address.

classification.rationale: 'To ensure you can recover your full portfolio… enable recovery with a verified email address.' This is the most weight-bearing sample in the set: 'full portfolio' and the consequence structure ('to ensure') carry genuine stake/pressure — not pure certainty-confidence, but actual load (your full portfolio is at risk if you don't act). Stable 'Practical' (Weight+Space, intelligent ruler executing a decision, Ch2 p. 497) fits: the line is structured, consequential, and directive without being aggressive. Penetrating aspect (Space-led structural orientation). Stress=time, pole=sustained: the sustained consequence arc ('to ensure… enable') is time-extended. Motor: Pressing (sustained+direct+strong) into Gliding (sustained+direct+light) — the line builds pressure then releases into the instruction.

text: Henlo, and furthermore deploy your Beravault

classification.rationale: 'Henlo, and furthermore deploy your Beravault.' This is playfully internet-native — 'Henlo' (misspelled greeting) + 'and furthermore' (mock-formal escalation) + invented proper noun 'Beravault'. The mock-formal register ('and furthermore') is a Mobile 'Acknowledged' moment: the copy is self-aware, performing its own weirdness for an audience that gets the joke. Radiating aspect (Flow-led): the playful expansiveness radiates outward. Free flow: uncontrolled, spilling. Motor: Float (light+flexible+sustained) into Flick (light+flexible+quick) — weightless and scattered. The greeting 'Henlo' flashes a Near 'Warm' outer beat before the mock-formal pivot.
